name: io.github.mrz1880/mcp-keycloak-admin
title: Keycloak Admin
description: Administer Keycloak via its Admin REST API: users, roles, clients, groups, IdP, events.

environmentVariables.name: KEYCLOAK_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Keycloak server (no trailing slash).

environmentVariables.name: KC_ADMIN_REALM
environmentVariables.description: Realm holding the admin user (password mode; default master).

environmentVariables.name: READ_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: When true, write and destructive tools are not registered.

environmentVariables.name: ALLOWED_REALMS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allow-list of realms the server may operate on.
